# analyze-stock-kpi

> Library-based stock KPI CLI: per-ticker fundamentals via yfinance plus a daily CNN Fear & Greed sentiment snapshot. No API keys, no scraping. Each ticker emits a `FundamentalsSnapshot` (~30 fields) with a nested `CompositeScores` (six 0-100 proxies) and the cron writes per-year `FearGreedSnapshot` history files.

## Documentation

- [README.md](README.md): Quickstart, runtime outputs, universe-source table, sample stdout + JSON
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Rules for AI agents working in this repo (KISS / DRY / YAGNI, pydantic-only, complexity gates)
- [docs/architecture.md](docs/architecture.md): Module map, data flow, public types, external boundaries
- [docs/UserStory.md](docs/UserStory.md): Product intent, current-milestone definition of done, non-goals
- [docs/roadmap.md](docs/roadmap.md): Milestone status (v0.3.0 / v0.4.0 / v0.5.0 / v0.5.1 shipped; v0.6.0 demo dashboard in progress), open issues
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Release history + known issues

## Source

- [src/fundamentals.py](src/fundamentals.py): `FundamentalsSnapshot(BaseModel)` plus `fetch_fundamentals` / `fetch_price_history` / `fetch_universe_fundamentals` (yfinance-backed)
- [src/composite_scores.py](src/composite_scores.py): `CompositeScores(BaseModel)` and six 0-100 score functions (quality / dividend / growth / big_call / aaqs / hgi)
- [src/sentiment.py](src/sentiment.py): `FearGreedSnapshot(BaseModel)`, headline fetcher, historical-payload merger, per-year file writer
- [src/universe.py](src/universe.py): Universe resolver (TICKERS / TICKERS_FILE / UNIVERSE precedence, dedup, comment stripping)
- [src/__main__.py](src/__main__.py): CLI entrypoint — orchestrates banner, fetch, compose, table, persist
- [src/utils/parse_args.py](src/utils/parse_args.py): `CliArgs(BaseSettings)` typed CLI + env vars
- [src/assets/universes/](src/assets/universes): Preset ticker lists (`qte77-watchlist`, `sp500`, `eurostoxx`, `japan`, `south-korea`, `south-america`, `crypto-top10`)

## Decisions (ADRs)

- [docs/decisions/0000-remove-traderfox.md](docs/decisions/0000-remove-traderfox.md): Replace Traderfox Playwright scraper with library-based KPI pipeline
- [docs/decisions/0001-defer-financetoolkit.md](docs/decisions/0001-defer-financetoolkit.md): Defer `financetoolkit` dep — `yf.Ticker.info` already exposes the v0.4.0 ratios
- [docs/decisions/0002-simplified-composites.md](docs/decisions/0002-simplified-composites.md): Simplified composite formulas are the deliberate v0.5.0 design, not a placeholder
- [docs/decisions/0003-defer-rs-hedging-epic.md](docs/decisions/0003-defer-rs-hedging-epic.md): Defer the v0.6.0 RS hedging epic; behavioral price analytics fits a sibling repo, not this single-purpose KPI CLI

## Reference

- [docs/cnn-fg-api.md](docs/cnn-fg-api.md): Observed CNN Fear & Greed JSON endpoint schema; backfillable vs daily-only fields
- [pyproject.toml](pyproject.toml): Dependency declaration, ruff / pyright / pytest config, `[tool.bumpversion]` rules
- [Makefile](Makefile): `make setup_dev`, `make run`, `make validate`, `make help`
- [.github/workflows/](.github/workflows): `validate`, `fear-greed` daily cron + `demo-snapshot` weekly cron (both verified-commit pattern to the `data` branch), `gh-pages` Pages deploy, `links-fail-fast`, `bump-my-version`, `codeql`, `sbom`
- [docs/demo/](docs/demo): Static GitHub Pages dashboard sources (`index.html`, `app.js`, `style.css`). Live at <https://qte77.github.io/analyze-stock-kpi/>; fetches data cross-origin from raw.githubusercontent.com on the `data` branch.
- [scripts/build_demo_manifest.py](scripts/build_demo_manifest.py): Stdlib-only manifest builder for `results/demo/<UNIVERSE>/index.json` (universe / latest / dates / updated_at). Called by `demo-snapshot.yml` after each snapshot.

## Optional

- [tests/](tests): Pytest suite — fixtures under `tests/fixtures/`, hand-computed expectations, plain `==` (no `pytest.approx`)
- [tests/conftest.py](tests/conftest.py): Shared fixture loaders (`load_fundamentals_fixture`, `load_fear_greed_fixture`)
